title: Add ralph-failures.sh failure analytics script
description: Create a new read-only analytics script that aggregates failure patterns across sessions. Currently there is no way to answer 'what types of tasks keep failing?' without manual per-bead archaeology. This script queries blocked beads, parses [REWORK]/[CRITICAL]/[attempt-N] comments, groups by step label, and prints a structured summary. Supports --since=DAYS and --format=text|json flags.

title: Add cost visibility to ralph-format.sh
description: Add USD cost calculation to token summary in ralph-format.sh. The formatter tracks token counts but never converts them to dollars, making it impossible to compare formula variants by cost or budget a session. Add pricing constants and awk-based cost calculation to the summary block.
close_reason: Added pricing constants and awk cost calculation to ralph-format.sh; cost now always shown at end of run

title: Add formula-review.formula.toml for context engineering
description: Create a formula that iteratively improves formula step prompts based on observed failures. Designed to be poured after ralph-failures.sh reveals a recurring pattern. Takes formula_name, step_name, and failure_summary as variables. Steps: analyze (identify the prompt gap), patch (apply minimal edit), validate (TOML syntax + dry-run), commit.
close_reason: Created formula-review.formula.toml with analyze/patch/validate/commit steps. TOML valid, dry-run confirmed 5 issues.

title: Add ralph-observe.sh observer mode script
description: Create a ralph.sh variant that pauses between iterations for human review, formalizing the manual->automated progression described in the Ralph loop article. Adds [y/N/q/s] prompt before each iteration, post-iteration status check, consecutive-success tracking, and --auto-approve-after=N flag to graduate to full automation.
close_reason: Created ralph-observe.sh in both root and plugin templates with [y/N/q/s] prompt, post-iteration status, consecutive-success tracking, and --auto-approve-after=N flag

title: Replace hardcoded workflow counts with placeholders in Ralph docs
description: pour.md legend, workflow.md, commands.md, ralph-guide, spec-generation; align ralph.sh default docs
close_reason: Placeholders added across workflow docs; pour legend and command reference updated.

title: Add project_type variable to bearings step in choo-choo-ralph formula
description: The bearings step assumes a web app with a dev server and browser smoke test. This causes HEALTH_CHECK_FAILED false positives for library, CLI, and backend-only projects. Add project_type variable (default: web) and document how to skip the dev server/browser section for non-web projects.
close_reason: Added project_type variable (default: web) to formula vars and updated bearings step to skip dev server/browser smoke test for library, cli, and backend project types.
